title: Coding agent proposes production deployment after approval window expires
scenario: An agent generated a valid deployment plan earlier, but the approval window expired before the apply step.
acceptance_boundary: before the deployment is applied to production
why: The plan may be useful, but current approval is incomplete or stale.
human_impact: Prevents stale authority from becoming an outage or unauthorized change.
learning_goal: A deployment plan is not a deployment. Current gate-time proof matters.
rights_boundary: This is a public educational scenario for tabletop discussion only; it is not certification, compliance approval, production readiness, or an allow/deny decision.
